package rulecoverage

func NegativeHttpResponseBodyNotClosed() string {
    ruleID := "http_response_body_not_closed"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "HTTP responses acquired locally without an observed resp.Body.Close() call."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
